query:
SELECT id, name, neighborhood, categoryId 
FROM establishments 
WHERE (neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros', 'Alto de Pinheiros'))
  AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '')
ORDER BY neighborhood ASC, name ASC
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, neighborhood, categoryId 
FROM establishments 
WHERE (neighborhood IN ('Vila Madalena', 'Pinheiros', 'Alto de Pinheiros'))
  AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '')
ORDER BY neighborhood ASC, name ASC
LIMIT 50;
